response.justification: The candidate is a broadly experienced, craftsmanship-oriented senior engineer with nearly two decades of full-stack, low-latency, and open-source work, but the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, growth measurement, or telemetry/metrics infrastructure — the core of this Principal role. Career trajectory tops out at Senior/Staff on small-to-mid product teams, without evidence of the multi-workstream, cross-org technical leadership expected at IC6.
strengths: 15+ years of engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and backend systems in multiple required languages (JavaScript/TypeScript, Java, C/C++, C#)
High-throughput distributed systems exposure at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/sec, low-latency async services)
Strong quality/testing culture: TDD, CI/CD, test tooling authorship, workshops and mentoring — plus recent AI-agent/MCP tooling work
concerns: No experimentation, growth, or measurement platform experience (no A/B testing, metrics/guardrails, feature flighting, or rollout automation on the resume)
No demonstrated statistical analysis or data-science-adjacent work; the role demands high data aptitude and experimental rigor
No evidence of Principal-level scope: leading multi-team initiatives, platform-wide architecture, or cross-org stakeholder influence

key_factors.factor: Below-Principal scope and leadership track record
Strong general engineering fundamentals and scale exposure
